_comment: Performance baseline for the witness-gen-wasm bench suite.
PR-1b SLA gate fails when any benchmark's measured mean exceeds the value
below by more than `slack_pct` (default 10%). Values originate from PR-1a's
first run; see PERF.md for context, key observations, and reproduction.
HOST PIN: numbers are calibrated for Apple Silicon (Darwin aarch64, M-series).
CI must run on macos-14 (or any Apple-Silicon-class runner) to match.
Running on a different host class will produce false-positive regressions.
Future work: per-host calibration sections (ubuntu-x86_64, etc.) once we
decide whether CI is worth Apple-Silicon minute multiplier or we re-baseline.
